message:
fix(fuzz): fuzz_pidfd_timer PidfdClose must poison fd to -1 (bd-2t616)

Same fd-reuse pattern as bd-tw26d (fuzz_socket). PidfdClose
called libc::close(fd) but stored (fd, Stale) in the table.
Kernel reuses closed fds for subsequent PidfdOpen calls, so
pidfd_send_signal on the stale slot targeted a now-valid fd
→ rc=0 broke the 'must fail on stale' assertion. Poison fd to
-1 (always-invalid sentinel) so the assertion holds regardless
of kernel fd reuse.

Also fixes closed_at < created_at timestamp ordering across 9
previously-closed fuzz-harness beads (validation was rejecting
the import).

Verified: 60s re-fuzz → 0 crashes.
